evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Conducting automated data quality checks; Documenting data processes and transformations thoroughly; ensure transparency and reproducibility; robust data models; attention to detail
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour: quality checks, documentation, transparency, and reproducibility dominate; no velocity language.
evidence.domain_risk: public broadcaster; media analytics; audience insights; no financial/regulatory signal
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Moderate: public media analytics without explicit financial/regulatory consequence; operational data reliability concern secondary.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Design and implement robust data models; Collaborate with data engineers and analysts; Support Data & AI team
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Mid: established analytics function with multiple roles (engineers, analysts); candidate bridges technical/business gap.
evidence.jd_authorship: Transforming raw data into structured datasets; Designing and implementing robust data models; Conducting automated data quality checks; Documenting processes; Translating business requirements into data solutions; Supporting team in solving challenges
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Recruiter: mix of specific dbt/Great Expectations tools with generic boilerplate (transforming data, collaborating); some technical specificity mixed with recruiter language.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: data engineers; analysts; audience/customer insights; operational excellence
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Internal data: role focuses on data infrastructure and analytics support for internal analytics teams.
evidence.autonomy_level: Design and implement models; Collaborate with data engineers; Optimize datasets; Proactively identify opportunities; Support team
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Execution: candidate owns defined data modeling and optimization work within team collaboration.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools or expected AI capability.
evidence.testing_framing: Conducting automated data quality checks using tools such as Great Expectations; ensure transparency and reproducibility
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Responsibility: data quality checks and automation framed as core responsibility.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Conducting automated data quality checks; Documenting data processes and transformations thoroughly; ensure transparency and reproducibility
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Moderate: quality and documentation concern secondary to analytics enablement and insight generation.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Transforming raw data; Designing models; Optimizing datasets; Integrating new sources; Supporting team
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Fix/scale: improving and extending existing analytics infrastructure for public broadcaster.
evidence.language_gate: Excellent command of Dutch (CEFR level C2 required)
evidence.loss_aversion: Conducting automated data quality checks using tools such as Great Expectations; Documenting data processes and transformations thoroughly; ensure transparency.
